title: Women In PR Embracing Artificial Intelligence

html: Women in PR embracing artificial intelligence at the 8th edition of the Lagos Digital PR Summit, with theme: “Reinventing Public Relations Proficiencies With Artificial Intelligence”, organized by the Nigerian Institute of Public Relations (NIPR), Lagos state chapter.
